{{Quote|I have been told that a student with your level of training should have no difficulties with this particular mission|[[Jedi Praxeum protocol droid|Jedi Academy protocol droid]] briefing [[Jaden Korr]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
The '''mission to [[Zonju V]]''' was carried out in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] by [[Jaden Korr]] for the [[New Jedi Order]].

==The mission==
Korr was sent to [[Zonju V]] to meet a [[Unidentified spaceport worker|spaceport worker]] who was in possession of important information about the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], a [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]] which was causing problems around the galaxy. Korr was to meet the worker in an abandoned outpost three kilometers outside of [[Zoronhed]].

[[File:ZonjuVLandscape2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|One of the locations that [[Jaden Korr]] passed while being chased by the [[Disciples of Ragnos]].]]Korr purchased a [[Flare-S swoop/Legends|Flare-S swoop]] for his journey to the outpost. On the way he was attacked by members of a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] working for the Disciples of Ragnos. He managed to kill or evade some of them, using [[mounted lightsaber combat]] techniques. When he finally reached the outpost, the worker was assassinated by a sniper before he could tell Korr anything.

Korr reckoned that he should leave immediately so he stole one of the gang's swoops. Being chased by the gang, Korr resorted to both mounted lightsaber combat and daring swoop stunts to shake off the pursuers, including piloting his swoop to jump across a deep chasm. Eventually, he managed to lose them and get to the spaceport and off the planet.

==Behind the scenes==
There is no set number of swoop gang members in this level of the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' game. They continue to respawn until the mission ends.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
